description_long: This is a polygonal, upright bottle with a faceted cylindrical body and a conical shoulder leading to a short, flat-topped neck. The main body is a medium blue color, interrupted by a wide, horizontal light gray band encircling the upper portion. The neck and cap are both light gray, with the cap appearing as a simple, flat-topped cylinder. The bottle has a geometric, low-detail design with no visible branding, text, or decorative elements. The surface appears smooth and hard, typical of plastic bottles used for water or soft drinks. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle is fully intact.
description: A faceted blue bottle with a light gray band and cap, featuring a simple, geometric design and smooth surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue body, wide light gray band, and flat gray cap clearly.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same color pattern and geometric facets visible.
description_view_2: Rear view matches the front and side, with no additional features or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blue body, gray band, and cap with no distinguishing marks.
